title: Freshly Baked American Chicken Casserole
description: A classic American dish featuring chicken, pasta, and a creamy sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until it is al dente.
In a large skillet, saute the chicken in a little bit of oil until it is cooked through.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta, chicken, cream of chicken soup, milk, shredded cheese, frozen peas and carrots, salt, black pepper, and onion powder.
Mix all the ingredients together until they are well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
